testsuite.name: TestParser
testsuite.system-out: Token à Parser : TOKEN<MOT_CLEF,INT,0,1,> TOKEN<IDENTIFIANT,x,0,5,> TOKEN<EGAL_ASSIGNATION,=,0,7,> TOKEN<INT,1,0,9,> TOKEN<PLUS,+,0,11,> TOKEN<INT,2,0,13,> TOKEN<PLUS,+,0,14,> TOKEN<INT,3,0,15,> VarDeclStmt Type(INT) Identifier(x) BinaryExpr(+) BinaryExpr(+) IntLiteral(1) IntLiteral(2) IntLiteral(3)
